note: AlphaAbsolute runs one-shot scripts (not persistent HTTP servers). The dashboard and reports generate static HTML files opened in the browser. The NotebookLM MCP server uses stdio transport (not HTTP).

configurations.name: Daily Report Pipeline
configurations.description: Full daily pipeline: FRED macro → yfinance → PULSE screener → Claude API report → PDF → Telegram

configurations.name: CIO Dashboard Generator
configurations.description: Generates output/dashboard.html from portfolio.json + trade_log.json and opens in browser

configurations.name: PULSE Screener (Agent 3)
configurations.description: Runs 3-screen PULSE scan on 22-stock universe: Leader / Bottom Fish / Hypergrowth

configurations.name: Macro Data Fetch
configurations.description: Fetches FRED + yfinance macro data and saves to data/macro_YYMMDD.json

configurations.name: PDF from Markdown
configurations.description: Converts a daily brief markdown to PDF. Usage: python scripts/report_to_pdf.py output/daily_brief_YYMMDD.md

configurations.name: NotebookLM MCP Server
configurations.description: Starts NotebookLM MCP server (stdio transport — add to .claude/settings.json mcpServers, not a HTTP server)
